name: OSTEOPATHIA STRIATA
definition: VOORHOEVE DISEASE disorder of secondary spongiosa of X-linked dominant inheritance / sporadic occurrence
dominant_finding: dense linear longitudinal striations in diaphyses + metaphysis of long tubular bones: typically
discriminating_features: dense linear longitudinal striations in diaphyses + metaphysis of long tubular bones: typically
radiating fan-shaped densities of "sunburst" appearance from acetabulum into ileum

general: dense linear longitudinal striations in diaphyses + metaphysis of long tubular bones: typically
radiating fan-shaped densities of "sunburst" appearance from acetabulum into ileum
